tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
qualifying = [p for p in prs if p['closes_linear']]
print(f"Qualifying: {len(qualifying)}")
for p in qualifying:
    print(p['number'], p['repo'], p['title'], '->', p['closes_linear'])

created = []
for p in qualifying:
    issue = github.create_issue(repo='acme/web', title='Verify: ' + p['title'])
    created.append((p['number'], issue))

len(created), created[:3]
"}
